---
title: "calluna_xylem_cleaning"
format: html
editor: visual
---

```{r}
#| label: libraries
#| message: false
#| warning: false

library(tidyverse)
library(readr)
library(readxl)
library(ggplot2)
library(janitor)
library(plotrix)
library(patchwork)
library(ggdist)
library(lme4)
```

```{r}
#| label: import

raw_data <- read.csv("raw_data/DURIN_raw_LygraFire_field_trait_2025.csv") 

```

```{r}
#| label: check evenness
#| message: false
#| warning: false

#this chunk creates a dataframe that count the amount of xylem per treatment before and after filtering by circularity

xylem_count_evenness <- raw_data |>
  count(treatment)

xylem_count_evenness_filtered <- raw_data |>
  mutate(circ = (4*3.14)*(Area/(Perim.*Perim.))) |>
  filter(circ >= 0.70) |>
  count(treatment)

xylem_count_combined <- xylem_count_evenness |>
  mutate(count_filter = xylem_count_evenness_filtered$n) |>
  mutate(percentage_remaining = count_filter/n)

names(xylem_count_combined) <- c("Treatment", "Number of xylems", "Number of xylems after filtering", "Percentage xylem remaining")
  

xylem_count_combined
```
